nodes.label: AuthRepositoryTest.kt
AuthRepositoryTest
.beforeEach()
.tearDown()
.`authStateFlow should react to user state changes and account token changes`()
.`loading the policies should emit masterPasswordPolicyFlow if the password fails any checks`()
.`rememberedEmailAddress should pull from and update AuthDiskSource`()
.`rememberedOrgIdentifier should pull from and update AuthDiskSource`()
.`tdeLoginComplete should directly access the authDiskSource`()
.`shouldTrustDevice should directly access the authDiskSource`()
.`passwordResetReason should pull from the user's profile in AuthDiskSource`()
.`organizations should return an empty list when there is no active user`()
.`organizations should pull from the organizations in the AuthDiskSource`()
.`delete account fails if not logged in`()
.`delete account fails if hashPassword fails`()
.`delete account fails if deleteAccount fails`()
.`delete account fails if deleteAccount fails with message`()
.`deleteAccountWithMasterPassword succeeds`()
.`deleteAccountWithOneTimePassword succeeds`()
.`refreshAccessTokenSynchronously returns failure if not logged in`()
.`refreshAccessTokenSynchronously returns failure if refreshTokenSynchronously fails`()
.`refreshAccessTokenSynchronously returns logs out and returns failure if refreshTokenSynchronously returns invalid_grant`()
.`refreshAccessTokenSynchronously returns logs out and returns failure if refreshTokenSynchronously returns Forbidden`()
.`refreshAccessTokenSynchronously returns logs out and returns failure if refreshTokenSynchronously returns Unauthorized`()
.`refreshAccessTokenSynchronously returns success and sets account tokens`()
.`createNewSsoUser when no active user returns failure`()
.`createNewSsoUser when remembered org identifier returns failure`()
.`createNewSsoUser when getOrganizationAutoEnrollStatus fails returns failure`()
.`createNewSsoUser when getOrganizationKeys fails returns failure`()
.`createNewSsoUser when makeRegisterTdeKeysAndUnlockVault fails returns failure for v1 encryption`()
.`createNewSsoUser when postKeysForTdeRegistration fails returns failure`()
.`createNewSsoUser when postKeysForTdeRegistration succeeds returns success`()
.`createNewSsoUser when createAccountKeys fails returns failure for v1 encryption`()
.`createNewSsoUser when organizationResetPasswordEnroll fails returns failure for v1 encryption`()
.`createNewSsoUser when shouldTrustDevice false should not trust the device returns Success for v1 encryption`()
.`createNewSsoUser when shouldTrustDevice true should trust the device returns Success for v1 encryption`()
.`completeTdeLogin without active user fails`()
.`completeTdeLogin without private key fails when EnrollAeadOnKeyRotation is disabled`()
.`completeTdeLogin without private key and account keys fails when EnrollAeadOnKeyRotation is enabled`()
.`completeTdeLogin without account keys unlocks vault with private key when EnrollAeadOnKeyRotation is enabled`()
.`completeTdeLogin unlocks vault with account keys when EnrollAeadOnKeyRotation is enabled`()
.`completeTdeLogin unlocks vault with private key when EnrollAeadOnKeyRotation is disabled`()
.`completeTdeLogin where vault unlock fails should return LoginResult error`()
.`completeTdeLogin with accountKeys with null nested fields should unlock vault with null properties`()
.`login when pre login fails should return Error with no message`()
.`login get token fails should return Error with no message when server is an official Quant Vault server`()
.`login get token fails should return UnofficialServerError when server is an unofficial Quant Vault server`()
.`login get token fails should return CertificateError when SSLHandshakeException is thrown`()
.`prelogin fails should return CertificateError when SSLHandshakeException is thrown`()
.`login get token returns Invalid should return Error with correct message`()
.`login get token should return InvalidType NewDeviceVerification when message is new device verification needed`()
.`login get token succeeds should return Success, unlockVault, update AuthState, update stored keys, and sync`()
.`login get token succeeds with accountKeys with null nested fields should unlock vault with null properties`()
.`login should return Error result when get token succeeds but unlock vault fails`()
.`login get token succeeds with null keys and hasMasterPassword false should not call unlockVault`()
.`login get token succeeds when there is an existing user should switch to the new logged in user and lock the old user's vault`()
.`login get token returns two factor request should return TwoFactorRequired`()
.`login two factor with remember saves two factor auth token`()
.`login two factor should return Error result when get token succeeds but unlock vault fails`()
.`login uses remembered two factor tokens`()
.`login two factor returns error if no cached auth data`()
.`login get token returns invalid request should return EncryptionKeyMigrationRequired`()
.`login with device get token fails should return Error with no message`()
.`login with device get token returns Invalid should return Error with correct message`()
.`login with device get token succeeds should return Success, update AuthState, update stored keys, and sync with MasteryKey`()
.`login with device should return Error result when get token succeeds but unlock vault fails`()
.`login with device get token returns two factor request should return TwoFactorRequired`()
.`login with device two factor with remember saves two factor auth token`()
.`SSO login get token fails should return Error with no message`()
.`SSO login get token returns Invalid should return Error with correct message`()
.`SSO login get token succeeds should return Success, update AuthState, update stored keys, and sync`()
.`SSO login get token succeeds with key connector and master password should return success and not unlock the vault`()
.`SSO login get token succeeds with key connector and no master password should return failure`()
.`SSO login get token succeeds with key connector and no master password should return success and unlock the vault`()
.`SSO login get token succeeds with key connector and accountKeys with null nested fields should unlock vault`()
.`SSO login get token succeeds with key connector, no master password, no key and no private key should return failure`()
.`SSO login get token succeeds with key connector, no master password, no key and no private key should return success and unlock the vault`()
.`SSO login get token succeeds with key connector when key, privateKey and master password are null should return ConfirmKeyConnectorDomain`()
.`ContinueKeyConnectorLogin should return Success and unlock the vault after login returns ConfirmKeyConnector`()
.`login with device get token succeeds should return Success, update AuthState, update stored keys, and sync with UserKey`()
.`SSO login get token succeeds with trusted device key and no keys should return Success, clear device key, update AuthState, update stored keys, and sync`()
.`SSO login get token succeeds with trusted device key should return Success, clear device key, update AuthState, update stored keys, and sync`()
.`SSO login get token succeeds without trusted device key should return Success, unlock the vault with pending request, update AuthState, update stored keys, and sync`()
.`SSO login get token succeeds when there is an existing user should switch to the new logged in user`()
.`SSO login get token returns two factor request should return TwoFactorRequired`()
.`SSO login two factor with remember saves two factor auth token`()
.`SSO login uses remembered two factor tokens`()
.`register check data breaches error should still return register success`()
.`register check data breaches found and strong password should return DataBreachFound`()
.`register check data breaches and weak password should return DataBreachAndWeakPassword`()
.`register check no data breaches found with weak password should return WeakPassword`()
.`register check data breaches Success should return Success`()
.`register Success should return Success`()
.`register Failure should return Error with no message`()
.`register returns Invalid should return Error with invalid message`()
.`register returns Invalid should return Error with first message in map`()
.`register with email token Success should return Success`()

.`setPassword with getOrganizationKeys failure should return Error`()

.`setPassword with no failures should return Success`()

.`setPassword with accountsService setPassword success should return Success for v1`()

.`setPassword with unlockVaultWithMasterPassword error should return Failure for v1`()
.`passwordHintRequest with valid email should return Success`()
.`passwordHintRequest with error response should return Error`()
.`passwordHintRequest with failure should return Error with null message`()

.`getVerifiedOrganizationDomainSsoDetails Failure should return Failure `()
.`prevalidateSso Failure should return Failure`()
.`prevalidateSso Failure response should return Failure with message`()

.`prevalidateSso Success with a valid token should return Success`()
.`logout for an inactive account should call logout on the UserLogoutManager`()
.`requestOneTimePasscode with success response should return Success`()
.`requestOneTimePasscode with error response should return Error`()
.`verifyOneTimePasscode with success response should return Verified result`()
.`verifyOneTimePasscode with error response should return NotVerified result`()
.`resendVerificationCodeEmail uses cached request data to make api call`()
.`resendVerificationCodeEmail uses cached request data to make api call with error`()
.`resendVerificationCodeEmail returns error if no request data cached`()
.`switchAccount when there is no saved UserState should do nothing`()
.`switchAccount when the given userId is the same as the current activeUserId should reset any pending account additions`()
.`switchAccount when the given userId does not correspond to a saved account should do nothing`()
.`switchAccount when the userId is valid should update the current UserState and reset any pending account additions`()
.`getIsKnownDevice should return failure when service returns failure`()
.`getIsKnownDevice should return success when service returns success`()
.`getPasswordBreachCount should return failure when service returns failure`()
.`getPasswordBreachCount should return success when service returns success`()
.`getPasswordStrength returns expected results for various strength levels`()
.`validatePassword with no current user returns ValidatePasswordResult Error`()
.`validatePassword with no stored password hash and no stored user key returns ValidatePasswordResult Error`()
.`validatePassword with sdk failure returns a ValidatePasswordResult Error`()
.`validatePassword with sdk success returns a ValidatePasswordResult Success`()

.`validatePassword with no stored password hash and a stored user key with sdk success returns ValidatePasswordResult Success valid`()

.`validatePinUserKey returns ValidatePinResult Success with valid true when SDK validatePin returns true`()

.`syncOrgKeysFlow emissions for inactive user should clear the last sync time`()
.`validatePasswordAgainstPolicy validates password against policy requirements`()
.`sendVerificationEmail success should return success`()

.`sendVerificationEmail failure should return error`()

.`validateEmailToken should return error result when service returns error without expired message`()
.`validateEmailToken should return error result when service returns failure`()
.`setOnboardingStatus should save the onboarding status to disk`()
.`setOnboardingStatus with no userId does not change the onboarding state`()
.`on successful login a new user should have onboarding status set if has not previously logged in`()
.`on successful login does not set onboarding status if user has previously logged in`()

.`continueKeyConnectorLogin returns error if keyConnectorResponse is null`()
